programme.title: MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM THE WITCH FROM MERCURY SEASON2
programme.desc: Suletta loses Miorine and Aerial in a duel. Miorine is preparing for the presidential election as promised to Prospera.

programme.title: MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM THE WITCH FROM MERCURY SEASON2
programme.desc: Miorine, accompanied by the Aerial, lands on Earth and starts a discussion with the Earthians leading the protests.

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: Karasuno take on Jozenji, and soon realise that their opponents are highly unpredictable to play against.

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: Johzenji are fired up, but can they make a spirited comeback to claim a win?

programme.title: KUBO WON'T LET ME BE INVISIBLE
programme.desc: After the final exam, Shiraishi and Kubo are worried that they won't be able to stay in the same class again.

programme.title: KUBO WON'T LET ME BE INVISIBLE
programme.desc: Kubo, Saki and Akina shop in the supermarket for flower viewing and come across Shiraishi and Seita.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: Lily, sleepless after last night with Akutsu, dozes off in class. He appears in her romance game dream—could this be her chance to win him over?

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: Exhausted, Lily collapses. Akutsu carries her home but stays as she clings to him. Later, she quietly approaches his sleeping form.

programme.title: MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM THE WITCH FROM MERCURY SEASON2
programme.desc: Suletta loses Miorine and Aerial in a duel. Miorine is preparing for the presidential election as promised to Prospera.

programme.title: IN/SPECTRE SEASON 2
programme.desc: Tae is living with a yokai cat. Fishermen in her seaside town find dead fish coming in with the tide every morning.

programme.title: IN/SPECTRE SEASON 2
programme.desc: Kotoko finds out a wooden doll kills fish with electricity at night. She and others decide to get rid of it.

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: Johzenji are fired up, but can they make a spirited comeback to claim a win?

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: With Daichi injured, Ennoshita takes the captain's spot in the game against Wakutani South.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: Exhausted, Lily collapses. Akutsu carries her home but stays as she clings to him. Later, she quietly approaches his sleeping form.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: Akutsu and Lily are seen together, sparking rumors. As they struggle to explain, Yuuka unexpectedly asks Akutsu on a date!?

programme.title: KUBO WON'T LET ME BE INVISIBLE
programme.desc: Starting a new school term, Shirashi finds out he is in the same class as Kubo, Hazuki, and Tamao.

programme.title: KUBO WON'T LET ME BE INVISIBLE
programme.desc: On the day when students need to measure their height, Kubo challenges Shirashi to see who is taller.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: Exhausted, Lily collapses. Akutsu carries her home but stays as she clings to him. Later, she quietly approaches his sleeping form.

programme.title: MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM THE WITCH FROM MERCURY SEASON2
programme.desc: Guel discovers that Shaddiq is the mastermind behind the abduction of Sarius.

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: Karasuno's next opponent is Kakugawa, a volleyball team that has a player who is 201cm tall.

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: Tsukishima seeks help from his brother and coach to improve his blocking ability.

programme.title: WHY RAELIANA ENDED UP AT THE DUKE'S MANSION
programme.desc: After her mysterious death, Rinko is reincarnated into Raeliana, a character in a novel destined to be killed.

programme.title: WHY RAELIANA ENDED UP AT THE DUKE'S MANSION
programme.desc: Raeliana goes to the duke's mansion to seal a deal with Noah, but he seems unfazed by the trump card she plays.

programme.title: WHY RAELIANA ENDED UP AT THE DUKE'S MANSION
programme.desc: Raeliana moves to live with Noah to receive domestic arts training, but they find it difficult to pretend to be in love.

programme.title: WHY RAELIANA ENDED UP AT THE DUKE'S MANSION
programme.desc: Raeliana and Noah arrive at the ball, and Noah asks Raeliana to get an invitation to the noble ladies' gathering.

programme.title: ONE PIECE: MARINEFORD ARC
programme.desc: Luffy faces the greatest battle yet, as pirates and marines clash in a war that will reshape the era.

programme.title: TEASING MASTER TAKAGI-SAN SEASON 3
programme.desc: Nishikata and Takagi-san make their first shrine visit to make wishes, and they have their first competition this year.

programme.title: TEASING MASTER TAKAGI-SAN SEASON 3
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Nishikata is sure Takagi-san will tease him. Meanwhile, various things happen within the school.

programme.title: TEASING MASTER TAKAGI-SAN SEASON 3
programme.desc: 14th March is unavoidable after Valentine's Day. What's Nishikata's strategy and what favour does Takagi-san ask of him?

programme.desc: Exhausted, Lily collapses. Akutsu carries her home but stays as she clings to him. Later, she quietly approaches his sleeping form.
